roa.docketEntryComment: PEOPLE'S OPPOS TO DEF MTS EVID FILED
DEFT'S MOT TO SUPPR EVID PER PC1538,5 FILED
/CAL:PTD PROGRESS REPORT RE 25 HOURS OF COMMUNITY SERVICE/CTORD:MATTER OFFCALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:DEFENDANT HAS SATISFIEDALL PROGRAM REQUIREMENTS PER PTD/

/CAL:PROOF OF FOP ENROLLMENT/DEF:HAS A FINANCIAL HARDSHIP/PROB MOD/CTORD:THE THREE MONTHS FIRST OFFENDER PROGRAM (FOP) DELETED AS A CONDITIONOF PROBATION/COMUN:25 (IN LIEU OF FOP) THRU PTD/DEF:ADMONISHED THAT DMV WILL REQUIRE THE 3 MONTHS FOP IS HE WANTS HIS CDL/VD:FOP COMPLETION DATE OF 11-30-10/DEF:APPEARANCE IS WAIVED IF COMMUNITY SERVICE HOURS HAVE BEEN COMPLETED

/CAL SENTENCE/TWS/CH4 ISS CPROB PROB 3 Y PJ 3D/CTS 3/X AS TO COUNT 5, DEFENDANT SHALL SERVE A TERM IN COUNTY JAIL OF 3 DAYS WITH 3 DAYS CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED,/FOP1:3 MONTH/LCHEM/LVAL/WS/MPROBFINE/SECFEE/ICNA/PF220/VF1/OR25/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/CONTD: 07-06-10 PROOF OF FOP ENROLLMENT IN DEPT 12//CONTD: 11-30-10 PROOF OF FOP COMPLETION IN DEPT 12/DEF:APPEARANCE IS WAIVED IF HE FILES PROOF OF ENROLLMENT AND COMPLETION PRIOR TO COURT DATES,//X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/

/CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING/X PEOPLE'S MOTION TO ORALLY AMEND THE COMPLAINTO ADD A COUNT 4, SECTION 23103 PURSUANT TO 23103,5 VC AS A MISDEMEANOR, ANDCOUNT 5, PC SECTION 653F(D) AS A MISDEMEANOR IS GRANTED,/TEXT:DEFT ADV &PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 4 AND 5/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/REMA/
/CAL:PROOF OF ENROLLMENT IN FOP/CONT/DEF:APPEARANCE IS WAIVED IF PROOF OFENROLLMENT IS FILED WITH THE COURT,/
